name_cn:
Genuine quality, replica version MiuMiu
5BB142, Miu family new bowling bag, the velvet leather element is hot this autumn and winter. Top-grade top-grain velvet calf leather. The bag is exquisite, three-dimensional, and structured. The front engraved logo echoes the leather color. Removable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap. New canvas lining, with zippered pocket. Many celebrities and influencers have this style. Size: 22x10.5x7.5cm, comes with original packaging
